## Inputs

| Name                                                                                                                              | Description                         | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Default            | Required |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | :------: |
| <a name="input_availability_zones"></a> [availability_zones](#input_availability_zones)                                           | 가용 영역 설정                      | `list(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_aws_account"></a> [aws_account](#input_aws_account)                                                                | AWS 계정 ID 설정                    | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_aws_region"></a> [aws_region](#input_aws_region)                                                                   | AWS 리전 설정                       | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | `"ap-northeast-2"` |    no    |
| <a name="input_ecs_appautoscaling_target"></a> [ecs_appautoscaling_target](#input_ecs_appautoscaling_target)                      | ECS Auto Scaling Target 설정        | <pre>map(object({<br/> min_capacity = number # 최소 Task 2개가 항상 실행되도록 설정<br/> max_capacity = number # 최대 Task 6개까지 증가 할 수 있도록 설정<br/> resource_id = string # AG를 적용할 대상 리소스 지정, 여기서는 ECS 서비스 ARN 형식의 일부 기재<br/> scalable_dimension = string # 조정할 수 있는 AWS 리소스의 특정 속성을 지정하는 필드<br/> service_namespace = string<br/> cluster_name = string # AG가 어떤 ecs cluster에 매핑되는지 ecs cluster의 이름 지정<br/> service_name = string # AG가 어떤 ecs service에 매핑되는지 ecs service의 이름 지정<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_appautoscaling_target_policy"></a> [ecs_appautoscaling_target_policy](#input_ecs_appautoscaling_target_policy) | ECS Auto Scaling Target Policy 설정 | <pre>map(object({<br/> scale_out = object({<br/> name = string<br/> policy_type = string<br/> step_scaling_policy_conf = object({<br/> adjustment_type = string<br/> cooldown = number<br/> metric_aggregation_type = string<br/> step_adjustment = map(object({<br/> metric_interval_lower_bound = number<br/> metric_interval_upper_bound = optional(number)<br/> scaling_adjustment = number<br/> }))<br/> })<br/> })<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_cluster"></a> [ecs_cluster](#input_ecs_cluster)                                                                | ECS Cluster 설정                    | <pre>map(object({<br/> cluster_name = string<br/> env = string<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_cpu_scale_out_alert"></a> [ecs_cpu_scale_out_alert](#input_ecs_cpu_scale_out_alert)                            | ECS CPU Scale Out Alert Policy      | <pre>map(object({<br/> alarm_name = string<br/> comparison_operator = string<br/> evaluation_periods = string<br/> metric_name = string<br/> namespace = string<br/> period = string<br/> statistic = string<br/> threshold = string<br/> dimensions = object({<br/> cluster_name = string<br/> service_name = string<br/> })<br/> env = string<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_security_group"></a> [ecs_security_group](#input_ecs_security_group)                                           | ECS 보안그룹 설정                   | <pre>map(object({<br/> security_group_name = string<br/> description = string<br/> env = string<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_service"></a> [ecs_service](#input_ecs_service)                                                                | ECS 서비스 설정                     | <pre>map(object({<br/> subnets = string<br/> launch_type = string # ECS Launch Type ( EC2 or Fargate )<br/> service_role = string # ECS Service Role<br/> deployment_controller = string<br/> cluster_name = string<br/> service_name = string # ECS 서비스 도메인명<br/> desired_count = number # ECS 서비스 Task 개수<br/> container_name = string # ECS Container Name<br/> container_port = number # ALB Listen Container Port<br/> task_definitions = string<br/> env = string<br/> health_check_grace_period_sec = number # 헬스 체크 그레이스 기간<br/> assign_public_ip = bool # 퍼블릭 IP 지정 여부<br/> target_group_arn = string<br/> security_group_name = string<br/> deployment_circuit_breaker = bool<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_sg_rules"></a> [ecs_sg_rules](#input_ecs_sg_rules)                                                             | ECS 보안그룹 규칙                   | <pre>map(object({<br/> type = string<br/> description = string<br/> security_group_key = string<br/> from_port = number<br/> to_port = number<br/> ip_protocol = string<br/> cidr_ipv4 = optional(list(string))<br/> referenced_security_group_id = optional(list(string))<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ecs_task_definitions"></a> [ecs_task_definitions](#input_ecs_task_definitions)                                     | ECS Task Definition 설정            | <pre>map(object({<br/> name = string<br/> task_role = string<br/> task_exec_role = string<br/> network_mode = string<br/> launch_type = string<br/> task_total_cpu = string<br/> task_total_memory = string<br/> runtime_platform_oprating_system_family = string<br/> runtime_platform_cpu_architecture = string<br/> task_family = string<br/> env = string<br/> volume = object({<br/> name = string<br/> })<br/> ephemeral_storage = number<br/> containers = list(object({<br/> name = string<br/> image = string<br/> version = string<br/> cpu = number<br/> memory = number<br/> port = number<br/> protocol = string<br/> essential = bool<br/> env_variables = map(string)<br/> mount_points = list(object({<br/> sourceVolume = string<br/> containerPath = string<br/> readOnly = bool<br/> }))<br/> health_check = object({<br/> command = string<br/> interval = number<br/> timeout = number<br/> retries = number<br/> })<br/> env = string<br/> }))<br/> }))</pre> | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_env"></a> [env](#input_env)                                                                                        | AWS 개발 환경 설정                  | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_private_subnets_cidr"></a> [private_subnets_cidr](#input_private_subnets_cidr)                                     | 프라이빗 서브넷 설정                | `list(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_project_name"></a> [project_name](#input_project_name)                                                             | 프로젝트 이름 설정                  | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | `"sandbox"`        |    no    |
| <a name="input_public_subnets_cidr"></a> [public_subnets_cidr](#input_public_subnets_cidr)                                        | 퍼블릭 서브넷 설정                  | `list(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a                |   yes    |
| <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input_tags)                                                                                     | 공통 태그 설정                      | `map(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | n/a                |   yes    |

## Outputs

No outputs.
